data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: An extra layer of security requiring a second form of identification.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS, apps, and hardware keys for multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.3 for encryption in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Account Activity Alerts
data.description: Alerts users about suspicious account activities.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models to detect anomalies.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Prevent denial-of-service attacks through network defense strategies.
data.technical_spec: Cloud Armor and traffic filtering systems.

data.title: Security Patch Management
data.description: Ensures the system is up-to-date with the latest security patches.
